label: Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning

node.label: Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning
node.definition: Behavior is learned from demonstrations, or the reward structure explaining demonstrations is inferred.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning is modeled as depending on Reinforcement learning, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences and feeding downstream nodes such as Robotics & embodied AI.
examples: atlas downstream link to Robotics & embodied AI
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences.

dependencies.rationale: Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning follows the learning setup expressed by Reinforcement learning.

In this atlas graph, Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning has a `uses` dependency on Labels, targets, rewards & preferences because Labels, targets, rewards & preferences is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning has a `uses` dependency on Sequences, events & time series because Sequences, events & time series is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
